description: This pipeline handles data output and storage. The main steps include organizing the processed data, saving it to a specified location, and preparing it for further analysis.

e04fb4cf-ba7f-4bb2-9787-a78fd4ccdafe.name: ij1-contrast-histogram-enhancer
e04fb4cf-ba7f-4bb2-9787-a78fd4ccdafe.description: Implementation of the ImageJ contrast enhancer feature that uses histograms and normalization methods.

89e25c32-1711-4e7c-aaa9-a22806cbf785.name: ij1-set-lut-from-color-map
89e25c32-1711-4e7c-aaa9-a22806cbf785.description: Sets the LUT of the image from a predefined color map. This does not change the pixel data.
